Join the Coalition Learn More
The Coalition

The Coalition is not an audience.
It is a covenant.

A Coalition of the Willing is exactly what it names. Those who understand walk with us. Those who do not are not pursued.

I want to give.
Your gift funds the evidence systems, the farms, the schools, and the policy tools. $25 keeps FarmBlock running for a month.
Give to the work →
I want to show up.
Bring your skills — legal, technical, research, community. Eight hours of presence is the covenant.
Join the Coalition →
I represent an institution.
Full financials, 990-N filings, program evidence, and governing doctrine are published openly.
Review the record →
I want to build with you.
Black-led organizations, co-builders, and aligned institutions apply to the Coalition.
Apply →
Founding Cohort · Phase I · By Invitation
What E5 Builds

Not programs. Not charity.
Infrastructure.

E5 builds institutions, evidence systems, collaborative platforms, and community projects. All led by the lineage, for the lineage. The Coalition is the network. The Five Pillars are the doctrine. The projects are the proof.

Environmental
Food sovereignty, land stewardship, agriculture, and anti-food-apartheid infrastructure.
01
Economic
Business formation, cooperative ownership, and circular economics.
02
Educational
Private education, STEM, emerging technologies, and lineage-centered curriculum.
03
Engagement
Civic education, public policy literacy, media, storytelling, and mobilization.
04
Emancipated
The unfinished obligations of freedom. Documented obligations become policy research.
05
Research Framework

246 years of documented harm.
One disciplined research framework.

E5 applies the Craemer (2015) wage-hour methodology to calculate wage-loss and opportunity-loss for American chattel slavery. This is one lane of the reparations question — not the whole road. The research framework is open, auditable, and built to be cited.

246 years documented
$120T bond framework
5 analytical questions
1 disciplined methodology
Read the Research →
From the Founder

A note to the lineage.

This is not a campaign. It is a record being built.

For three centuries the obligations of emancipation went unrecorded — not because they were unknown, but because the architecture of remedy was never built.

E5 Enclave is the architecture. The Coalition is the network. The Five Pillars are the doctrine. The projects are the proof.

We do not promise a finish line. We promise discipline of scope — naming precisely what we are doing, and what we are not. We promise coordination over competition. We promise that what is measured cannot be dismissed.

The center holds. The work begins.

Israel Lee Chairman, E5 Enclave Incorporated
Stay in the Record

Dispatches from the Coalition.

Research, program updates, and coalition intelligence — twice a month at most.

We don't sell data. We don't spam. Twice a month at maximum.

E5 Enclave
